downloadTitle: System Center 2022 Integration Pack for FTP
downloadDescription: System Center 2022 Integration Pack for FTP
detailsSection: The Integration Pack for FTP is an add-on for System Center 2022 Orchestrator that enables you to create activities within runbooks that automate FTP operations which include creating a folder, deleting a file or folder, downloading, uploading, file and folder listing and synchronization.
systemRequirementsSection:
Supported Operating Systems Windows Server 2022
  • System Center 2022 - Orchestrator
  • FTP Server
  • Windows Server 2019 or higher
  • .NET Framework 4.0 or higher (NET 4.7.2 recommended)
  • RAM – minimum 1GB (recommended 2GB)
  • Disk space minimum 200MB
  • CPU Dual Core or better
installInstructionSection: Download the .oip file, register the Integration Pack in Deployment Manager and then deploy the Integration Pack on Runbook Designer and Runbook Server.
